name: HOOCER — HM Ocular Compliance Portal
description: Official HM Office for Ocular Compliance & Eyelid Regulation citizen portal. Definitely legitimate. Your blinks are being monitored.

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><rect width='100' height='100' fill='%230b0c0c'/><text y='75' x='50' font-size='65' text-anchor='middle'>♛</text></svg>

_note_to_self: I added a PWA manifest to a joke website about blinking. This is fine. Everything is fine.
_another_note: The icon is a crown emoji in an SVG data URI. The manifest is 98% comments. This project has gotten away from me.
_final_note: If someone actually installs this as a PWA I want to know about it immediately.
